creator: meka@tilda.center
text: As I only started researching IPv6, there's a high probability I did something wrong, and if see something off, please let me know. What I observe is desktop acquiring IPv6 and setting proper default route, and after few minutes that route is gone. Strangely, when IPv6 is configured through dhcpcd, default route remains. I saw same behavior on laptop which has wlan0 and em0 as part of lagg0, so if there's some wrong config, I suspect it's on the router.
